prompt: Add VRP-style show ip interface command family
note: Added detail, brief, description, type filters, ip-configured filters, except filters, and per-interface variants.
decisions: Expose display ip interface as VVRP show ip interface while keeping show host ip interface for host-only diagnostics.
Use imported/VVRP IFNET interfaces plus VVRP IP state, not raw host interface addresses, for show ip interface output.

Add RM route table with Radix LPM index

+

Added RM route table indexes by prefix/interface/source and active-route LPM lookup.

+

Wire RM connected routes from IP interface events to FIB

+

IP address events now create connected active routes that FIB can use for forwarding lookup.

+

Files

+
  • src/RM/rib.py
  • src/RM/routes.py
  • src/RM/__init__.py
  • tests/test_routing.py
+

Decisions

+
  • RM route table is stored in CLI state and updated synchronously from RM_IM interface/address events.
  • FIB lookup uses the RM state route table when present; otherwise it keeps the older compatibility path.
+

+
